title: Rust lichen-core duty_cycle.rs: usage_permille truncates to u16
description: In rust/lichen-core/src/duty_cycle.rs, usage_permille() computes '((used as u64) * 1000 / WINDOW_MS) as u16'. If used exceeds ~65535 * 3600000 / 1000 = ~235 million ms (65 hours), this would overflow u16. In practice impossible since WINDOW_MS is 1 hour and used <= 3600000ms, but the function could return values > 1000 for over-limit usage, and u16 can hold up to 65535 permille (6553.5%). This is actually fine - just documenting for clarity.
close_reason: Documentation only - u16 permille range (0-65535) is sufficient for duty cycle use cases
